---
title: "Augmented Reality & 3D Gaussian Splatting im Web"
author: "Friedrich Commichau, Sven Fydrich, Dominik Pleimes"
format:
  html:
    theme: cosmo
jupyter: python3
bibliography: references.bib
---

## Theory & Methodology
---

Placeholder text block

##Capture & Pipeline
---

Placeholder text block

## Babylon.js Rendering
---
```
#siehe Doku
```

##Quiz
